title: Battle of Kamino (disambiguation)
content:
__NOTOC__
There have been several battles taking place on [[Kamino]] throughout galactic history, including the following:

==Canon==
*The [[Battle of Kamino]] during the [[Clone Wars]] in [[21 BBY]]
*[[Battle of Kamino (Kit Fisto)]], during the Clone Wars
*The [[Attack on Kamino]] during the early [[Imperial Era]] in [[19 BBY]]

==Legends==
*The [[First Battle of Kamino]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]
*The [[Battle of Kamino/Legends|Battle of Kamino]], during the Clone Wars in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]
*[[Battle of Kamino (Separatist–Mandalorian invasion)]] during the Clone Wars in [[20 BBY/Legends|19.42 BBY]]
*The [[Kamino uprising]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]] in [[12 BBY/Legends|12 BBY]]
*The [[Escape from Kamino (1 BBY)|Escape from Kamino]] by [[Subject 1138|Starkiller]] in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]
*The [[Assault on Kamino]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] in 1 BBY

==Real-world==
*[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]] titled "The Epic Battle for Kamino"
*''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 1: The Defense of Kamino]]'', the trade paperback collecting the issue

==See also==
*[[Escape from Kamino (disambiguation)]]
*[[Mission to Kamino (disambiguation)]]
